form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after three months second last of 8 at Doomben Cg&E Cl3 on March 4 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind True Amor carrying 55.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 7th of 12 at Doomben Cl2-Sw on October 4 over 1350m, 3.5 len behind Heman carrying 60kg at $61. Winning claims if anywhere near his best.
